---

## Description

A clear, concise description of the bug.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Device | e.g., Samsung Galaxy A22 |
| OS Version | e.g., Android 13 |
| App Version | e.g., 1.0.0 |
| React Native | e.g., 0.73.2 |
| RAM | e.g., 4 GB |

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. Hold face in front of camera
4. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Logs

<details>
<summary>Device logs</summary>

```
Paste adb logcat or Xcode console output here
```

</details>

## Screenshots / Video

If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## Additional Context

- Does this happen consistently or intermittently?
- Does it happen on specific devices only?
- Is the device rooted/jailbroken?
- Was the employee recently enrolled?
